prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **LC2 (3.8L V6 Turbo, 231ci)** with a forged internals build featuring **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.0:1 compression)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Crower billet crankshaft** to handle 25+ psi of boost reliably. Pair with **ARP head studs** and **Fel-Pro MLS head gaskets** for sealing.

Forced Induction: Swap the stock **Garrett T3 turbo** for a **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA (62mm, .82 A/R turbine housing)** with a **TurboSmart 45mm Hyper-Gate wastegate** and **Tial MV-R 50mm blow-off valve**. Use a **PTP 3.5" aluminum intercooler piping kit** and a **GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler (28x12x3.5")** for IAT control.

Fuel & Ignition: Convert to **Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump** with **SX Performance 42lb/hr injectors** (or **ID1000s** for E85). Add a **Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump** and **AEM 340lph external pump** for redundancy. Ignition system upgrade includes **MSD 6AL-2 digital ignition box**, **MSD Blaster 2 coil**, and **NGK TR6IX iridium spark plugs (gapped at .030")**. Tune via **Moates Ostrich 2.0 emulator** with a **custom LC2-specific ROM** (e.g., **TurboBuicks.com Stage 3+ bin file**).
estetica: Body: Install a **RK Sport Grand National-specific widebody kit** (flares for 10" wheels up front, 12" out back) with **custom-molded carbon fiber front splitter** and **RK Sport rear diffuser**. Paint in **PPG Deltron 998 "Black Cherry Pearl"** with **3M Matte Black vinyl roof wrap**.

Wheels & Suspension: Fit **BBS LM-R 17x9.5" (ET15) front and 17x11" (ET35) rear wheels** with **Nitto NT05R 255/40/17 and 295/40/17 tires**. Suspension includes **QA1 adjustable coilovers (double-adjustable, 400lb/in springs)** with **Energy Suspension polyurethane bushings** and **Hotchkis Sport sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)** for reduced body roll.

Interior: Replace stock seats with **Corbeau GTS II bucket seats (with 4-point harnesses)** and a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel hub**. Add a **Defi BF Advance 5-gauge cluster (boost, oil pressure, water temp, fuel pressure, AFR)** and **Sparco 6-point bolt-in roll cage (chrome-moly, 1.75" x .120" tubing)** for rigidity and safety.
